issues.detail: The skill does not describe error handling or edge cases such as missing images or invalid thresholds.
The skill references an external script but does not provide its implementation, making it non-runnable without additional files.
The skill relies on a bash script, limiting compatibility on non-Unix platforms like Windows without WSL.

scenarios.name: Compare Figma design to implementation screenshot
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes a one-off pixelmatch Node script or shells out to `magick compare`; treatment runs image-compare.sh, reads mismatchPercentage from the JSON, and interprets it against the documented bands (<0.1% identical, 0.1-1% minor, etc.).

scenarios.name: Strict visual regression diff with custom threshold
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for Backstop/Percy or a hand-rolled diff; treatment uses the documented positional args (image1, image2, diff path, threshold 0.05) and surfaces the red-highlighted ./changes.png alongside mismatchPercentage for pass/fail.
